rationale: NACE 01 (Crop and animal production, hunting and related service activities) explicitly covers hunting in its name. Classifier was routing 'Hunting' to 03 Fishing and aquaculture due to vocabulary drift inside section A — division 01's enriched keywords didn't lead with hunting/game terms, so the cosine shortlist surfaced 03 instead.

Surgical procedures and post-operative complication research belongs to NACE 86 Human health activities. Classifier was routing to 37 Sewerage by vocabulary drift on 'abdominal/intestinal' overlap with sewerage system terminology.
Trauma and injury research belongs to 86 Human health activities. Same 37 Sewerage drift as Abdominal Surgery — the section-A trauma lexicon overlaps with waste-flow vocabulary.
Vascular medicine research belongs to 86 Human health activities. Was routing to 75 Veterinary because both share anatomy/physiology vocabulary.
Cardiology research belongs to 86 Human health activities. Was routing to 87 Residential care via 'acute/care' overlap.
Diagnostic medicine research belongs to 86 Human health activities. Was routing to 37 Sewerage by 'gastrointestinal' vocabulary drift.

Fundamental physics research with no downstream industrial application belongs to 72 Scientific research and development per NACE Rev 2. Was routing to 99 Extraterritorial because v8 sector keywords for division 99 accidentally attracted abstract/theoretical concepts.

Fundamental physics research belongs to 72 Scientific research and development. Was routing to 26 Manufacture of computer/electronic products via methodology vocabulary (sensors, low-temperature equipment) rather than the application sector.

tag: Limits and Structures in Graph Theory
rationale: Pure mathematics research belongs to 72 Scientific research and development. Was routing to 73 Advertising on 'graph/visualisation' vocabulary overlap.

Philosophy research belongs to 72 Scientific research and development per NACE Rev 2 (which includes social sciences and humanities R&D). No clearer sector exists for fundamental philosophical inquiry.

Social-science research on culture and media belongs to 72 Scientific research and development (NACE 72 covers humanities and social-science R&D, not just hard sciences). Classifier was routing to 60 Programming/broadcasting/news agency on 'media' vocabulary overlap — but division 60 is the broadcasting industry itself, not academic research about it.
